entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF RAIN AND SNOW SHOWERS THIS MORNING, THEN SUNNY THIS AFTERNOON
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN CLEARING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 50
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 30S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
